description: This document is an enhanced transcript of the live presentations and group discussions with Mark Solms in 2022 at the Active Inference Institute. The focus is the 2018 paper "How and Why Consciousness Arises: Some Considerations from Physics and Physiology" by Mark Solms and Karl Friston.

methods.name: Bayesian modeling and inference
methods.description: Applied bayesian modeling and inference approach

key_findings: This document is an enhanced transcript of the live presentations and group discussions with Mark Solms in 2022 at the Active Inference Institute.
The focus is the 2018 paper "How and Why Consciousness Arises: Some Considerations from Physics and Physiology" by Mark Solms and Karl Friston.
